org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core

Class WhitePages<AT extends Agent>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.WhitePages<AT>
  • Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
 class WhitePages<AT extends Agent>
extends Object
    The white page system is able to list all the agents that exist on a kernel or on a set of kernel (depending of its implementation).

    The white page system has also the role to compute an unique identifier for each agent.

    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>, Nicolas GAUD <nicolas.gaud@utbm.fr>
